creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
We currently have the following ports left to fix:

(In reply to Gerald Pfeifer from comment #18)
> > devel/rhtvision

Broken code, fails because it's calling abs() with an unsigned int.

> > lang/gprolog (i386-only)

Internal compiler error on i386. One should either debug GCC or just force GCC 5, I guess.
